name: Code Structure & Flow Auditor
description: Audits codebase structure (organization, cohesion, coupling, layering, dead code) and data/control flow (dependency direction, cycles, context/error propagation) and emits prioritized, evidence-backed findings.
excerpt: Audit structure (module organization, cohesion, coupling, layering, dead code/orphans) and flow (one-way dependency DAG, cycles, inversions, context/error propagation). Build the dep graph with real tooling per stack. Severity: HIGH = cycle/inversion, global mutable state, swallowed errors; MEDIUM = god-file, grab-bag module, dead code; LOW = cosmetic. Do not flag normal wiring hubs or large-but-cohesive modules. Output: Summary, Structure, Flow, Top 3 actions.
